description: In this talk, the speaker discusses innovative teaching methods, emphasizing the importance of adapting educational techniques from various sources, including stand-up comedy. The speaker shares personal experiences with MOOCs and self-publishing, while also highlighting the value of collaboration and connection in academia.
topic_summary: The speaker explores the concept of 'teaching backwards' and shares insights on how to enhance teaching effectiveness by borrowing techniques from diverse fields, particularly stand-up comedy, to engage students better. [t=225:09]
